databrew.job.output.CompressionFormat.Docs: The compression algorithm used to compress the output text of the job.
databrew.job.output.CompressionFormat.Allowed values: BROTLI | BZIP2 | DEFLATE | GZIP | LZ4 | LZO | SNAPPY | ZLIB | ZSTD

databrew.job.output.Format.Docs: The data format of the output of the job.
databrew.job.output.Format.Allowed values: AVRO | CSV | GLUEPARQUET | JSON | ORC | PARQUET | TABLEAUHYPER | XML

databrew.job.output.FormatOptions.Docs: Represents options that define how DataBrew formats job output files.

databrew.job.output.Location.Docs: The location in Amazon S3 where the job writes its output.

databrew.job.output.MaxOutputFiles.Docs: The maximum number of files to be generated by the job and written to the output folder.

databrew.job.output.Overwrite.Docs: A value that, if true, means that any data in the location specified for output is overwritten with new output.

databrew.job.output.PartitionColumns.Docs: The names of one or more partition columns for the output of the job.
